prompt:
Analyze the image and generate an open-vocabulary scene graph.
Return:
1. A short scene description.
2. Objects with normalized bounding boxes in this format: <ref>object</ref><box>[[x1, y1, x2, y2]]</box>.
3. Spatial relations in this format: <pred>predicate</pred><box>[[subject_box]]</box><box>[[object_box]]</box>.
4. Depth layers from closest to farthest.
5. Four comparative question-answer pairs about object position, depth, or size.
Use coordinates from 0 to 999. Be concise.
answer:
1. A happy black and tan dog is shown in close-up outdoors, with its tongue hanging out, nose near the center, squinting eyes, and a blurred green background.

2. Objects:  
<ref>dog face</ref><box>[[61, 54, 921, 999]]</box>  
<ref>black nose</ref><box>[[406, 260, 681, 520]]</box>  
<ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 526, 523, 947]]</box>  
<ref>open mouth</ref><box>[[245, 445, 733, 789]]</box>  
<ref>left eye</ref><box>[[219, 110, 386, 251]]</box>  
<ref>right eye</ref><box>[[684, 148, 839, 287]]</box>  
<ref>left ear</ref><box>[[39, 82, 251, 485]]</box>  
<ref>right ear</ref><box>[[792, 221, 999, 607]]</box>  
<ref>dog body</ref><box>[[662, 627, 999, 999]]</box>  
<ref>green outdoor background</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>

3. Spatial relations:  
<pred>above</pred><box>[[406, 260, 681, 520]]</box><box>[[245, 445, 733, 789]]</box>  
<pred>protrudes from</pred><box>[[236, 526, 523, 947]]</box><box>[[245, 445, 733, 789]]</box>  
<pred>left of</pred><box>[[219, 110, 386, 251]]</box><box>[[684, 148, 839, 287]]</box>  
<pred>left of</pred><box>[[39, 82, 251, 485]]</box><box>[[792, 221, 999, 607]]</box>  
<pred>inside</pred><box>[[406, 260, 681, 520]]</box><box>[[61, 54, 921, 999]]</box>  
<pred>inside</pred><box>[[245, 445, 733, 789]]</box><box>[[61, 54, 921, 999]]</box>  
<pred>in front of</pred><box>[[61, 54, 921, 999]]</box><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>

4. Depth layers from closest to farthest:  
Layer 1: <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 526, 523, 947]]</box>, <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[406, 260, 681, 520]]</box>  
Layer 2: <ref>open mouth</ref><box>[[245, 445, 733, 789]]</box>, <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[61, 54, 921, 999]]</box>, <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[219, 110, 386, 251]]</box>, <ref>right eye</ref><box>[[684, 148, 839, 287]]</box>, <ref>left ear</ref><box>[[39, 82, 251, 485]]</box>, <ref>right ear</ref><box>[[792, 221, 999, 607]]</box>, <ref>dog body</ref><box>[[662, 627, 999, 999]]</box>  
Layer 3: <ref>green outdoor background</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>

5. Comparative question-answer pairs:  
1. Question: Which is closer to the viewer, the <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 526, 523, 947]]</box> or the <ref>green outdoor background</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 526, 523, 947]]</box> is closer.  
2. Question: Which is higher, the <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[406, 260, 681, 520]]</box> or the <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 526, 523, 947]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[406, 260, 681, 520]]</box> is higher.  
3. Question: Which is farther left, the <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[219, 110, 386, 251]]</box> or the <ref>right eye</ref><box>[[684, 148, 839, 287]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[219, 110, 386, 251]]</box> is farther left.  
4. Question: Which is larger, the <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[61, 54, 921, 999]]</box> or the <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[406, 260, 681, 520]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[61, 54, 921, 999]]</box> is larger.
